ask_category: Which category does this belong to?
ask_amount: You didn't mention the amount. How much?
not_understood: ❓ Didn't understand. Example: "150,000 spent on logistics"
ai_overloaded: ⚠️ AI service is currently overloaded. Please try again in a few minutes.
start_welcome:
👋 Welcome to VoiceCashly!

How will you use it?
help_text:
🤖 VoiceCashly — Financial Assistant

📋 Commands:
/report — Monthly report
/today — Today's balance
/balance — Current balance
/income — Income
/expense — Expenses
/top — Top categories
/switch — Switch account
/settings — Settings
/lang — Change language
/invite — Invite to team
/help — Help

💡 Send a voice or text message!
workspace_created:
✅ Personal account created!

Send a voice or text message.
team_workspace_created:
✅ "{{name}}" workspace created!

Send a voice or text message.
prompt_new_cat_name: 🆕 Send new category name by voice or text:
cat_not_found: ❓ Category "{{name}}" not found. Pick from existing.
cat_name_unclear: ❓ Category name unclear. Say or type again:
cat_not_exists_create_new:
Category "{{hint}}" not found.
Create it as a new one?
workspace_settings_menu:
🏢 Account: {{name}}

What would you like to change?
delete_ws_confirm:
⚠️ Delete account "{{name}}"?

All transactions and categories will be deleted. This cannot be undone!
ws_deleted_no_workspace: 🗑 Account deleted. Press /start to create a new one.
cannot_delete_only_ws: ❌ Cannot delete your only account. Create a new one first.
only_team_invite: ❌ Invites are for team accounts only. Create a team account via /start.
invite_invalid: ❌ Invite link is invalid or expired.
joined_workspace:
✅ You joined the team "{{name}}"!

Send a voice or text message.
